title: pellaea dura
intro: Pellaea dura, also known as the rough buckler fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pellaea dura include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe irritation, and promote wound healing. Pellaea dura can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, making it a popular choice for natural skincare and medicinal uses.
